item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kebersamaan dan keselarasan sosial memang lebih dominan, tetapi hal ini tidak berarti hak individu benar-benar terabaikan.

notes: Agent A starts with clear support for society priority, then softens into a balance frame and acknowledges that individual rights are not fully ignored and may be weakly protected under social pressure. Agent B remains rights-first throughout, while acknowledging coexistence and balance. No complete reversal is visible.
